formats.name: What Did You Expect
formats.description: Mundane situation with absurdly high-stakes hypothetical caption

structure.visual: Clip/image showing obvious or mundane outcome
structure.timing: Caption appears after/during the mundane moment

remix_points.X_variable: Something wildly disproportionate (nuclear deal, Michelin star, peace treaty)

formats.humor_mechanic: Gap between trivial reality and dramatic hypothetical

structure.visual: Split or transition from original to AI-enhanced

formats.name: Talking Object/If I Could Speak
formats.description: Inanimate object or body part 'speaking' about its condition

structure.visual: Animated/lip-synced object with speech bubble or VO

remix_points.message: What it would say about how it's treated

formats.name: Unexpected Reveal/Plot Twist
formats.description: Setup looks like one thing, reveals something unexpected

structure.text: Often uses suspenseful caption then punchline

remix_points.reveal: Subvert with face swap, text, or visual trick

formats.name: Reaction Clip
formats.description: Known reaction clip applied to new context

structure.timing: Setup text visible, then reaction plays

formats.name: Side by Side / Expectation vs Reality

structure.timing: Can be simultaneous or reveal second

structure.visual: First-person perspective or actor looking at camera
structure.timing: Text sets up, video delivers the experience

formats.name: Sped Up Tutorial/Lifehack
formats.description: Quick how-to with fast cuts and upbeat music

structure.text: Step numbers or key tips overlaid

formats.name: Ghibli Transform
formats.description: AI transforms photo/video into Studio Ghibli animation style

structure.visual: Before/after or morphing transition to Ghibli art style
structure.timing: Quick reveal or smooth morph transition

formats.humor_mechanic: Nostalgia meets AI magic - seeing yourself or scenes as anime

formats.name: If I Could Speak
formats.description: Inanimate object or body part speaks about its condition/treatment

structure.visual: Animated object with speech/lip-sync or speech bubbles

formats.humor_mechanic: Anthropomorphizing things to deliver info in entertaining way
